title: Saccocalyx vulnerariae

The plant is native to the island of Socotra off the coast of Yemen. Saccocalyx vulnerariae is a succulent plant, storing water in its leaves to survive in arid environments. This unique adaptation allows it to thrive in the dry conditions of its native habitat.
